instructions: Populate acceptedGoodRun only after a benchmark and regression report have been reviewed and accepted as a known-good baseline.
The CI gate fails closed while acceptedGoodRun is null.
Expected acceptedGoodRun shape: { acceptedAt, commit, benchmarkReportPath, regressionReportPath, promptReliabilityScore, regressionScore, prompts }.
Each prompt baseline row should include: promptId, prompt, completion, survival, confidence.
